name: frontier-eval scopes the scaffold to a single control family when --control is given
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --control confidentiality 2>e.txt; [ "$(grep -c 'control=' e.txt | head -1)" -ge 1 ] && grep -q 'families=1' e.txt && echo h16-single-control 1>&2
